title: eleocharis elliptica
intro: Eleocharis elliptica, also known as the elliptic spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is a perennial plant native to North America, primarily found in wetland areas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Eleocharis elliptica can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote health benefits like relieving coughs and colds, and soothing digestive issues.
